steps.title: Place invention before redesign
steps.content: Faure redesigned the battery in 1881, and Planté invented the original battery fifteen years earlier. The blank must show an action completed before another past action, so the past perfect tense is needed.

steps.title: Reject present and future verbs
steps.content: Choice A and Choice C use present-tense forms, while Choice B uses future tense. All conflict with an invention that happened before Faure's past redesign. The past perfect form fits the timeline. The answer is D.
